title: manage_tags
description: Manage tags across an Obsidian vault. List all tags with counts, add or remove tags from notes, rename tags globally, and find notes by tag combinations.

tags.description: Tags to add, remove, or search for (without # prefix)

old_tag.description: Tag to rename from (required for rename)

new_tag.description: Tag to rename to (required for rename)

tag_location.description: Where to add/remove tags: YAML frontmatter, inline #tag, or both

match_mode.description: For find_by_tags: match ALL tags or ANY tag
